title: Betrayal at Bespin

"'''Betrayal at Bespin'''" is a short story written by [[Michael Siglain]] and illustrated by [[Brian Rood]] that partially adapts [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. It was published on [[September 1]], [[2015]] by [[Disney–Lucasfilm Press]] in the anthology ''[[The Original Trilogy Stories]]''. It adapts [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back]] from the [[Millennium Falcon]]'s escape from [[Hoth]] to [[Boba Fett]]'s departure from [[Bespin]].

{{Shortstory-stub}}
